sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50053" key="i(eroko/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱερο-κόμος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n50053.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who takes charge of a temple</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.621</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Rhegium</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
